mdSummary:
# TreeView

Hierarchical tree with expand/collapse and selection.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Data Display/Lists & Trees
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/tree-view

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| TreeView | Items | `List<TreeViewItem<T>>?` | `` |  |
| TreeView | ShowCheckboxes | `bool` | `` |  |
| TreeView | Expandable | `bool` | `true` |  |
| TreeView | OnItemClick | `EventCallback<TreeViewItem<T>>` | `` |  |
| TreeView | OnItemCheck | `EventCallback<TreeViewItem<T>>` | `` |  |
| TreeView | ShowSearch | `bool` | `` |  |
| TreeView | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| TreeView | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| TreeViewNode | Item | `TreeView<T>.TreeViewItem<T>` | `default!` |  |
| TreeViewNode | Level | `int` | `` |  |
| TreeViewNode | ShowCheckboxes | `bool` | `` |  |
| TreeViewNode | Expandable | `bool` | `` |  |
| TreeViewNode | OnItemClick | `EventCallback<TreeView<T>.TreeViewItem<T>>` | `` |  |
| TreeViewNode | OnItemCheck | `EventCallback<TreeView<T>.TreeViewItem<T>>` | `` |  |

## Slots
- (none)

- `OnItemClick` (`EventCallback<TreeViewItem<T>>`)
- `OnItemCheck` (`EventCallback<TreeViewItem<T>>`)

## Example

